name: Orange Souffle (Frozen Gelatin) 1898
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak gelatin in 1/2 cup orange juice for 5 minutes.
2. Stir in boiling water to dissolve gelatin.
3. Mix the remaining 1/2 cup orange juice with sugar in a heavy pot and cook over high heat until a thin syrup forms, about 5 to 7 minutes.
4. Stir beaten yolks into the gelatin mixture. Stir in the hot syrup and continue stirring until the outside of the bowl begins to cool.
5. Refrigerate. When the mixture begins to set, gently fold in whipped cream and refrigerate until firm.
[8 servings. Each serving: 238 calories; 15 mg sodium; 143 mg cholesterol; 13 grams fat; 29 grams carbohydrates; 2 grams protein; 0.03 gram fiber.]
